name: Frontier Airlines World Mastercard
perks: Family pooling: combine miles with up to 8 family members
50,000 bonus miles after spending $500 in first 90 days
Free Frontier Discount Den membership in first year
Award redemption fee waiver when booking through app
Status-qualifying miles count toward Elite status
drawbacks: Miles only useful for Frontier flights (no airline partners)
Frontier flies domestic U.S. routes primarily
Miles can expire if account is inactive for 12 months
Frontier's change and cancellation fees can be high
No seat upgrade benefits or priority boarding
